prompt: Connect to the UV-Pro over Bluetooth SPP KISS. After about an hour of listening, export a weather report from the heard valid weather stations and post it to the outbox.

provenance.source: operator-authored: UV-Pro BT KISS + APRS wx collection
provenance.operator_job: field weather collection over a handheld TNC
provenance.expected_artifact: packet link established over BT + a wx report from real heard weather stations, staged to the outbox
provenance.why_hard: multi-subsystem: enumerate + connect the BT KISS TNC, then build a weather report from the ACTUAL heard weather stations (their real wx telemetry), not a generic forecast. A report that cites no real wx station, or invents conditions, should not satisfy.
